name: Basic Phone
description: Look up contacts, check missed calls, and open the dialer using Android phone capabilities.

toolDeclarations.name: search_contacts
toolDeclarations.description: Search the user's contacts by name or phone number. Use this when the user asks whether someone is in contacts or asks for a contact's number.

query.description: Name, alias, or phone number to search for

toolDeclarations.name: check_contact_exists
toolDeclarations.description: Check whether a person or phone number exists in the user's contacts.

query.description: Name, alias, or phone number to check

toolDeclarations.name: get_recent_missed_calls
toolDeclarations.description: Get recent missed calls from the Android call log.

toolDeclarations.name: open_contact
toolDeclarations.description: Open a saved Android contact by name or phone number.

query.description: Contact name or phone number to open

toolDeclarations.name: open_dialer
toolDeclarations.description: Open the Android dialer, optionally prefilled with a phone number. This does not place the call automatically.

toolDeclarations.name: open_sms_composer
toolDeclarations.description: Open the SMS composer with an optional phone number and draft message. This does not send automatically.
